rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increaseunder Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §28.0259, which governs school district PEIMS reporting on individual graduation committee diplomas. No conflict exists.
quote: Each school district shall report through the Public Education Information Management System (PEIMS) the number of district students each school year for which an individual graduation committee is established under Section 28.0258
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns graduation committee reporting and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
